description_long: This object consists of three small, wall-mounted display boxes or shadow boxes, each containing a photograph visible through a glass or clear plastic front. The boxes are arranged in a loose vertical cluster, with each box having a dark, possibly wooden or plastic frame and a recessed interior. The photographs inside depict groups of people and outdoor scenes, suggesting a personal or decorative use. The frames have a slightly irregular, handcrafted appearance, with some edges appearing uneven or organic. The backs and sides of the boxes are opaque and solid, while the fronts are transparent to showcase the photos. The overall look is decorative and suited for mounting on a wall in an urban environment such as a hallway, stairwell, or public building.
description: A set of three small, wall-mounted display boxes with glass fronts, each containing a photograph. The frames are dark and solid, with a handcrafted appearance.
description_view_0: Three display boxes are visible, each showing a different photograph through a clear front, with dark frames and visible depth.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth of the boxes and the thickness of the frames, with less visibility of the photographs.
description_view_2: Front-angled view highlighting the photographs inside the boxes and the recessed nature of the frames.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and construction of the boxes, with some photo details visible.
